Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Discard all State Cards and Symptom Cards from your Hand, and draw a number of Cards equal to the number discarded +1. {Vulnerable} all enemies for 1 turn. Alva gains 50% Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG.
